CustomField.description: JSON representation of the Tool Flow Graph defining which tools the agent can call and in what order. Format: {"version":"3.0","capabilitiesHash":"...","entry":["tool_a"],"flow":[{"from":"tool_a","type":"sequential","to":["tool_b"]},{"from":"tool_a","type":"exclusive","to":["tool_c","tool_d"]}]}. Generated at design-time and enforced at runtime by exposing only eligible tools to the LLM.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Defines the tool execution flow. Use the Generate Flow action to create this automatically from your agent capabilities, then review before enabling flow enforcement.
CustomField.label: Tool Flow Graph
